VBS !!!
July 18 - 22, 2022
We are very grateful Wendy McGraw has volunteered to step in for Sarah Loesch as Sarah goes through her cancer treatments. We are so very excited to have this opportunity for all the children. There are many opportunities to help.
Crews for ages 3 to rising 5th graders will have a week going on an off-road adventure with God. Songs, Snacks, Crafts, and Bible Stories for all. Invite your neighbors and your children’s friends. Cost is $40 per child or $80 for a family to cover the costs.
We are encouraging volunteers including youth that are rising 6th graders and older. We have a VBS website for registration of participants and volunteers. Please click the link to register.
https://vbspro.events/p/events/lslcvbs
